about.title: About This Site
text: This is a non-profit fan site dedicated to Adachi to Shimamura, created with the goal of bringing together in one place all available content of the work in English.
Here you will find everything from the story timeline, light novels, manga, CD dramas, mini anime and much more. All content is organized so you can easily enjoy it.
Adachi to Shimamura and all rights belong to Hitoma Iruma. This site is not officially affiliated with the creators or publishers.
Made with ❤️ by fans, for fans.
